name: audio-client-server
description: Real-time audio streaming client-server architecture using WebSockets and AWS
readme_excerpt: A production-grade audio streaming system that captures microphone input, streams via WebSockets, and processes through AWS services.

name: audio_client_server
description: Audio transcription pipeline with S3 and SQS integration
readme_excerpt: Processes audio files through an S3 upload pipeline with SQS message queuing for reliable transcription workflows.

name: def_orchestrator
description: Distributed workflow orchestration engine for cloud-native applications
readme_excerpt: Orchestrates complex multi-step workflows across distributed services with retry logic and state management.

name: github-portfolio-search
description: Search and explore GitHub portfolio with clustering and faceted search
readme_excerpt: A web application that indexes GitHub repositories and provides clustered browsing with full-text search capabilities.

name: s3-presigned-url-upload
description: Secure file upload system using S3 pre-signed URLs with Lambda backend
readme_excerpt: Generates time-limited pre-signed URLs for direct browser-to-S3 uploads, avoiding server-side file handling.

name: terraform-infra
description: Infrastructure as code for AWS environments using Terraform
readme_excerpt: Terraform modules for provisioning VPCs, ECS clusters, RDS instances, and CI/CD pipelines on AWS.

name: delete_old_branches
description: CLI tool to clean up stale git branches safely
readme_excerpt: Identifies and removes merged or stale branches from local and remote repositories with safety checks.

name: ml-pipeline
description: End-to-end machine learning pipeline with model training and deployment
readme_excerpt: Automated ML pipeline covering data ingestion, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and deployment to SageMaker.
